creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 227663
Update to 21.2.1.204.1703

Oracle SQL Developer 21.2.1 Bugs Fixed

August 2021

This list contains only a selection of higher priority bugs, customer bugs and issues raised by the community on the OTN Forum since the previous release. 

19c Clients for Thick Connections will no longer show an error on the Preferences/Test panel.
33131783 	EXCEPTION IN INITIALIZER ERROR IN SQLPLSQLLEXER IF BLANK/EMPTY
33131578 	FORUM: ARBORI EDITOR FREEZES IDE ON LARGE ARBORI FILES
33115655 	BROKEN SEMANTIC ANALYSIS
33056949 	ORDS REST DEVELOPMENT AND ORDS ADMINISTRATION ARE GETTING JA
32988810 	NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR IN DATA GRID WITH ORACLE/INSTANT CLIENT

Tested on 12.2 amd64: check-plist, install, run.
